heading.title: Settings

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.subtitle: Customize the interface look and feel.

themeMode.title: Theme Mode
themeMode.desc: Switch between light and dark themes.

developerMode.title: Developer Mode
developerMode.desc: Enable experimental features and debug logs.

autoSave.title: Auto-Save
autoSave.desc: Automatically save changes while editing documents.

email.title: Email Notifications
email.subtitle: Decide what messages arrive in your inbox.

jobAlerts.title: Job Alerts
jobAlerts.desc: Summary of new internships matching your preferences.

applicationUpdates.title: Application Updates
applicationUpdates.desc: Instant news about your submission status.

newsletter.title: Newsletter
newsletter.desc: Weekly insights and career growth tips.

directMessages.title: Direct Messages
directMessages.desc: Alerts when a recruiter messsages you.

modal.title: Delete your account?
modal.warning: This action is irreversible and will permanently delete all profile settings, resume files, job listings, and applications.
modal.genericError: Failed to delete account. Please try again later.
